_comment: Cursor adapter for searchoclock-core (Cursor 1.7+). Place at <project>/.cursor/hooks.json.
afterShellExecution is the command-failure surface; hooks exchange JSON over stdio.
The handler pipes the event to `socx hook` and Cursor surfaces stdout back into context.
VERIFY the exact hook event names + payload shape against https://cursor.com/docs/hooks (2026);
socx reads command/exit_code/stdout/stderr from the normalized superset, so a tiny shim may be
needed to map Cursor's field names if they differ. Set SOCX_HARNESS=cursor.
